Hello world. I’m Ágoston. 👋

This is a personal website, kinda oldschool but it shows my deep curiosity about trying out new things be it technology or art.

Over the past 15 years, I’ve explored various passions:

  • 📚 Started writing a book about the soft skills need for leadership in AI R&D
  • ✍️ Wrote blog posts about software, AI, leadership and strategy
  • 🎨 Tried my hand at drawing comics
  • 🎲 Designed my own board games

I believe in continuous learning and self-improvement. You can also find me sharing insights and experiences through my talks at various events.

Topics I Write About 🏷️
